name: mechanical-face
description: Mechanical conditions applied to boundary faces with 'zone face apply'. Stress conditions are face based; velocity, acceleration, and reaction conditions are applied to attached gridpoints.

notes: Use stress-normal for pressure-like loading normal to selected faces.
Use tensor components for global-axis stress loading.
FLAC2D workflows generally avoid xz, yz, and z-directed velocity conditions; FLAC2D still tracks out-of-plane stress where plane strain requires it.
Velocity boundary conditions are usually preferred for roller/fixed displacement boundaries.
Local components are interpreted from automatically generated gridpoint local axes.
Reaction conditions apply forces where the corresponding direction is fixed.
Use after fixity has been established.

common_patterns.name: Roller side boundaries
commands: zone face apply velocity-normal 0 range group 'East' or 'West'
zone face apply velocity-normal 0 range group 'Bottom'

common_patterns.name: Uniform normal stress
commands: zone face apply stress-normal -1e5 range group 'Top'
